_meta.note: Condensed index of Purview names for UI selection. **Primary** full Boon / Innate / Marvel text: SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf; tier books only where PB points there. Optional: `purviewInnateName` / `purviewInnateSummary` surface innate blurbs (they are not Boon picks). Optional `boonLadderNames`: string array of length 12 — printed Boon titles for ladder positions 1–12; each non-empty rung becomes one choosable `{purview}_dot_NN` in the merged boons table (empty string = no row). The wizard prefers these titles for chips. Optional `boonLadderNameByDot`: object map `"1"`…`"12"` to a name if you prefer sparse entries. Sparse signature Boons may also set `name` on rows in `boonPbMechanicsPatch.json` when the ladder row is blank.

artistry.name: Artistry
artistry.mechanicalEffects: Access Boons/Marvels per tier and Purview rules in Pandora’s Box.
artistry.purviewInnateSummary: Your performances and crafted works carry clear intent: witnesses experience your chosen emotional or informational message as if you had spoken plainly to them, even across language barriers (you choose who counts as intended audience). You gain Enhancement on appropriate Expression (or related Skill) rolls when creating or performing for others. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

beasts.name: Beasts
beasts.description: Animals, monstrous companions, and beastly motifs.
beasts.mechanicalEffects: Boons specify epithets/tags (e.g., Falcon) in Appendix listings.
beasts.purviewInnateSummary: You can speak with and understand mundane animals; they are inclined to aid you when you ask, within the limits of their intelligence and nature. You may treat Bonds with animals similarly to Bonds with people for purposes of teamwork the table approves. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

chaos.name: Chaos
chaos.description: Entropy, disruption, and unmaking of order.
chaos.mechanicalEffects: Purview Boons scale with Legend and tier.
chaos.purviewInnateSummary: Random mishaps and unplanned hazards slide off you: you ignore harm from accidental, unaimed peril (flying debris in a riot, a careless driver’s swerve, being trampled in a panicked crowd) so long as no attacker specifically meant to hurt you. Deliberate attacks and intentional hazards affect you normally. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

death.name: Death
death.description: Mortality, ghosts, and the road to the dead.
death.purviewInnateSummary: You sense death’s touch: recent deaths, corpses, and restless dead nearby register clearly; you can read a body’s obvious cause of death. Ghosts and the dead cannot hide their presence from you simply by being unseen (magic that veils them may still apply). — Pandora’s Box (Revised) / Scion: Hero, Death Purview innate.

deception.name: Deception
deception.purviewInnateSummary: Mortal observers cannot reliably catch you in a lie unless they have supernatural aid: mundane Insight or Perception fails automatically to pierce simple falsehoods you speak; supernatural onlookers may invoke a Clash of Wills as usual. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

earth.name: Earth
earth.description: Stone, soil, and the bones of the World.
earth.mechanicalEffects: Includes Boons like shaping or animating earth where tier allows.
earth.purviewInnateSummary: You feel vibrations and shifts through stone and soil touching your feet: you sense movement through connected earth out to a meaningful distance (Storyguide sets exact range), learning approximate mass, direction, and urgency. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

fertility.name: Fertility
fertility.purviewInnateSummary: Once per scene you can radiate a pulse of vital growth: nearby plants visibly perk or bloom, and allies in line of sight may shed bashing damage as if catching their breath in spring sunlight (resolve specifics at the table). — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

fire.name: Fire
fire.purviewInnateSummary: You cannot take damage or suffer any form of harm from fire, heat, or smoke inhalation. You can walk through wildfires or industrial microwaves unharmed, swim in magma for as long as you can hold your breath, and perform similar feats of fireproof heroism. Extreme cold is likewise harmless to you. Everything you wear is also immune to fire, and you possess the ability to create or douse small flames within Close range at will. You can light or put out a candle or a cigarette with a glance. Finally, you can sense the direction, location, and approximate size of any fire within Extreme Range. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Elemental Manipulation (Fire): Ember Skin.

forge.name: Forge
forge.description: Making, mending, and industry of the divine.
forge.purviewInnateSummary: Tools and machines make sense in your hands: you ignore Complications from unfamiliar controls or improvised use, and you may treat appropriate equipment as one dot better for Enhancement when operating it for its designed task. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

fortune.name: Fortune
fortune.description: Luck, omen, and the weaving of chance—threads of fate, omens, and turning points. This is the universal fate-and-luck Purview from Pandora’s Box (other books may name related Specialty Purviews separately).
fortune.purviewInnateSummary: You feel when blind chance is being bent: you sense the outcome bias of risky actions around you and notice when another power manipulates fate or prophecy in your presence, even if the effect would normally be hidden. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

wyrd.name: Wyrd
wyrd.description: The Æsir Hero **Signature** Specialty—binding, orlæg, and what was woven before you drew breath (Scion: Hero). Wyrd has its own Boon entries in this app; it is not the universal fate Purview other Scions take from the same chapter.
wyrd.purviewInnateSummary: You perceive bindings of orlæg and oaths that touch you: when a Fatebinding relevant to you is created or tugged, the Storyguide should give you a sensory cue, and you gain Enhancement to uncover or contest hidden wyrd laid on people or places you study. Æsir also work marvels of binding and foretold consequence per the Wyrd chapter. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).
wyrd.mechanicalEffects: Wyrd Boons: Cast the Runes, Spin the Thread (Scion: Hero); resolve details with your Storyguide.

health.name: Health
health.purviewInnateSummary: Your body mends quickly: you heal bashing damage each combat turn, lethal damage on a faster cadence than mortals, and aggravated damage on a daily scale (exact timing per tier in Hero/Pandora’s Box). — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

journeys.name: Journeys
boonLadderNames: Gate at the End of the Year
journeys.purviewInnateSummary: You always know which way to walk to reach a named place in the World unless magic obscures it, and you sense nearby Axis Mundi, gates, or otherworld thresholds within roughly Legend-scaled miles. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

moon.name: Moon
moon.description: Lunar cycles, tides of madness and intuition.
moon.purviewInnateSummary: The moon’s phases answer you: you gain Enhancement when acting under moonlight or while manipulating tides of emotion and transformation tied to lunar cycles; exact bonuses follow the Purview chapter. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

order.name: Order
order.purviewInnateSummary: When you truthfully explain laws or rightful authority, listeners know you speak correctly for the duration of the scene; you may extend that mantle of legitimacy to innocents you declare free of guilt while using Order marvels or Code of Heaven–compatible effects. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

passion.name: Passion
passion.description: Emotions given mythic weight—love, rage, fear, etc.
passion.mechanicalEffects: Often tagged with specific emotions in deity write-ups.
passion.purviewInnateSummary: You read hearts at a glance: you gain Enhancement to uncover or influence strong emotions, and you forge Bonds more readily when you spend a scene reinforcing intimacy or devotion. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

prosperity.name: Prosperity
prosperity.purviewInnateSummary: Fortune’s small kindnesses find you: you always have enough mundane currency for reasonable purchases when it matters to the story, and you can spot lucrative opportunities others overlook. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

sky.name: Sky
sky.description: Heavens, weather, and the high places.
sky.purviewInnateSummary: Weather in your vicinity responds to your mood in small ways, and you may nudge clouds, wind, or temperature within reason without spending Legend for minor atmospheric shifts. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

stars.name: Stars
stars.description: Celestial patterns, astrology, and far voyages.
stars.purviewInnateSummary: Once per scene you may read a thread of destiny written in the stars, asking the Storyguide one concrete yes/no about an action you or a Bandmate is about to take; they answer truthfully to the best of their knowledge. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

sun.name: Sun
boonLadderNames: Falling Through the Edge of Time
sun.purviewInnateSummary: You are a walking atmosphere: you may raise or lower hope within a Field as if you were a minor environmental effect, with rating tied to half your Legend (see Sun Purview chapter). — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

war.name: War
war.description: Battle, strategy, and the red work.
war.purviewInnateSummary: Whenever you are embroiled in conflict—social, mental, or physical—you gain Enhancement on actions that escalate or press the fight rather than defuse it. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

water.name: Water
water.description: Oceans, rivers, rain, and the drowning deep.
water.purviewInnateSummary: Water welcomes you: you breathe and move through water as easily as air for mundane environments, and liquid currents subtly assist you, granting Enhancement when swimming or manipulating flowing water. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

wild.name: Wild
wild.description: Untamed places and instincts beyond civilization.
wild.purviewInnateSummary: The wild recognizes its kin: animals native to untamed places treat you with favorable Attitude unless you provoke them, and you gain Enhancement when surviving or navigating hostile wilderness. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

darkness.name: Darkness
darkness.description: Shadow, concealment, and what hunts within it.
darkness.purviewInnateSummary: You see clearly in natural darkness and can snuff or dim mundane light sources within Close range as a reflexive trick of shadow; magical darkness may still oppose you per the usual rules. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

epicStrength.name: Epic Strength
epicStrength.mechanicalEffects: Epic Attribute Purview—see Pandora’s Box for Boons.
epicStrength.purviewInnateSummary: You gain +1 Enhancement on Might-based rolls where raw power or lifting applies, and you may waive one Complication per scene caused by sheer bulk or weight when carrying or hefting objects, subject to Storyguide limits. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

epicStamina.name: Epic Stamina
epicStamina.mechanicalEffects: Epic Attribute Purview—see Pandora’s Box for Boons.
epicStamina.purviewInnateSummary: You ignore Complications from ordinary hunger, thirst, and fatigue, and you are immune to mundane diseases and environmental illnesses; supernatural ailments still apply. (Epic Stamina also gates many resilience Boons.) — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

epicDexterity.name: Epic Dexterity
epicDexterity.description: Mythic speed and precision beyond mortal limits.
epicDexterity.mechanicalEffects: Epic Attribute Purview—see Pandora’s Box for Boons.
epicDexterity.purviewInnateSummary: You gain +1 Enhancement on rolls using Dexterity where speed, coordination, or precision apply, and once per scene you may waive a single Complication on a Defense roll tied to agility, as the table interprets your tier limits. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

beauty.name: Beauty
beauty.purviewInnateSummary: Your presence and presentation carry divine weight: when your looks or bearing matter, you gain Enhancement on appropriate social rolls, and attempts to use superficial appeal to manipulate you suffer increased Difficulty or Scale on resistance, as agreed with the Storyguide. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

frost.name: Frost
frost.description: Cold, winter, and the stillness of ice.
frost.purviewInnateSummary: Cold cannot harm you, nor do ice, snow, or winter terrain impose Complications on your movement; you may briefly freeze a footpath of water or mist solid enough to walk as part of normal movement while the Purview holds. — Scion: Hero; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

arcaneCalculus.name: Arcane Calculus
arcaneCalculus.description: The Mythos pantheon Signature Purview: forbidden and revelatory mathematics—knowledge pursued regardless of cost, mapping truths that strain sanity and Fate.
arcaneCalculus.mechanicalEffects: Innate powers, Marvels, and Boons per Scion: Masks of the Mythos; confirm limits with that book and Pandora’s Box where cross-listed. MotM prints two titled Boons for this Signature (see boons.json); further Awareness Boons are chronicle/SG work at the table — this app does not invent catalog entries for them.
arcaneCalculus.purviewInnateSummary: When performing analysis, research, or surveying investigation actions, you gain +1 Enhancement. You can ignore up to 1 Complication from such actions that would lead you to misinterpret the information you gain on the action. — Masks of the Mythos, Arcane Calculus (Innate Power).

nemeton.name: Nemeton
nemeton.description: The Nemetondevos pantheon Signature Purview: sacred shrines whose mementos open gates to Gaulish Godsrealms or your Sanctum—terrain, memory, and the Wheel’s cycle.
nemeton.mechanicalEffects: Innate power, Marvels, and Boons per Mysteries of the World (Nemeton chapter); Hero limits on how many nemetons you may hold apply per that write-up.
nemeton.purviewInnateSummary: Your nemeton is never far: you may sense its condition, and you can open brief passages between its sacred ground and the Field you occupy when the Storyguide agrees the miracle fits (limits on simultaneous nemetons per MotW). — Mysteries of the World; Pandora’s Box (Revised), Nemeton.

asha.name: Asha
asha.description: The Yazata pantheon Signature Purview: the Threefold Path of good thoughts, words, and deeds—cosmic harmony, truth, and the struggle against the Druj.
asha.mechanicalEffects: Innate powers, Marvels, Mantles, and Boons per Mysteries of the World; confirm tiers and costs with that book.
asha.purviewInnateSummary: You walk the Threefold Path in deed as well as word: when your thoughts, words, and actions align with Asha, gain Enhancement to resist the Druj’s lies and to bolster allies who mirror that harmony. — Mysteries of the World; Pandora’s Box (Revised).

shuila.name: Shuilá
shuila.description: The Anunna Signature: fate-deeds, tablets of office, and the weight of what was decreed before you spoke.
shuila.purviewInnateSummary: The tablets remember deeds before speech: when you gather clues toward a declared Deed, later rolls using the same Skill + Attribute toward that Deed may buy Enhancements from those threshold successes, and catastrophic failure may be bought as future complications instead (see Me of the Deed). — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Shuilá.

pachakutic.name: Pachakutic
pachakutic.description: The Apu Signature: world-turning, mountain omens, and the hinge moments of ages.
pachakutic.purviewInnateSummary: Huaca remember sacrifice: you may bank a point of Legend at a prepared huaca and sense when its stored power is tapped; you gain Enhancement when reading omens in mountains or weather omens tied to world-turning events. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Pachakutic.

atuaMana.name: Mana
atuaMana.description: The Atua Signature: power-as-presence, right relationship, and the face you cannot fake before your kin.
atuaMana.purviewInnateSummary: Right relationship shows on your face before your kin: you sense breaches of tapu or improper standing in a community gathering, and you gain Enhancement to call others back into proper roles. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Mana.

paganito.name: Paganito
paganito.description: The Balahala Signature: ancestor compact, vigil of the dead, and bargains sealed in smoke.
paganito.purviewInnateSummary: Ancestors press close at the threshold: you sense restless dead or broken ancestor bargains within Short range of a home shrine, and you gain Enhancement to negotiate or chastise such spirits. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Paganito.

dvoeverie.name: Dvoeverie
dvoeverie.description: The Bogovi Signature: twinned truth, hidden worship, and the old law that walks in two skins.
dvoeverie.purviewInnateSummary: Twinned truths tug at you: when someone wears two faces socially, you gain Enhancement to spot the seam, and you may sense hidden worship or dual loyalties in a crowd. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Dvoeverie.

yoga.name: Yógá
yoga.description: The Devá Signature: disciplined devotion, earned insight, and the body as a practiced instrument of truth.
yoga.purviewInnateSummary: Disciplined breath aligns body and truth: you ignore Complications from ordinary fatigue during yoga-like centering, and you gain Enhancement on Academics or Occult rolls to recall sacred practice. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Yógá.

marzeh.name: Marzeh
marzeh.description: The Ilhm Signature: feast-law, lineage rolls, and the obligations guests inherit when bread is broken.
marzeh.purviewInnateSummary: Guests and hosts know the law of the table: you sense when hospitality is about to be broken, and you gain Enhancement to enforce oaths sworn over shared bread. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Marzeh.

tzolkin.name: Tzolk’in
tzolkin.description: The K’uh Signature: sacred calendar, appointed sorrow, and days that arrive already decided.
tzolkin.purviewInnateSummary: Named days arrive carrying weight: once per session you may declare a day’s omen and gain Enhancement on actions that lean into or avert that omen, as the calendar permits. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Tzolk’in.

yaoyorozuNoKamigami.name: Yaoyorozu-no-Kamigami
yaoyorozuNoKamigami.description: The Kami Signature: myriad kami acknowledged, propitiated, and set quietly watching at thresholds.
yaoyorozuNoKamigami.purviewInnateSummary: Myriad kami murmur in busy places: you sense shrines, pollution, or offended spirits in urban crowds, and you gain Enhancement to appease or command minor kami tied to a location. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Yaoyorozu no Kamigami.

dodaem.name: Dodaem
dodaem.description: The Manitou Signature: totem medicine, dream-quest instruction, and war-songs that bind the camp.
dodaem.purviewInnateSummary: The Manitou watch through your courtesy: you feel when spirits tied to a place are insulted or pleased, and you gain Enhancement to mediate between humans and local wights. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Dodaem.

heku.name: Heku
heku.description: The Netjer Signature: speaking power, effigies that move, and the harvest of living sekhem.
heku.purviewInnateSummary: Speaking a true name shapes the soul’s light: you gain Enhancement when acting on ren you know, and you feel when another Netjer scion harvests renown tied to you. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Heku.

tianming.name: Tianming
tianming.description: The Shén Signature: Heaven’s mandate read in omens, promotion earned in trial, and the red thread of office.
tianming.purviewInnateSummary: Mandate flickers when rulers fail Heaven’s measure: you sense unjust edicts or corrupt magistrates within a civil scene, and you gain Enhancement to call out Heaven’s displeasure with evidence. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Tianming.

qut.name: Qut
qut.description: The Tengri Signature: contest-fortune, spirit interrogation, and the ransom taken from spilled blood.
qut.purviewInnateSummary: The eternal blue hears honest wind: you feel when oaths sworn under open sky are tested, and you gain Enhancement to ride or call wind that carries truth-telling voices. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Qut.

yidam.name: Yidam
yidam.description: The Pālas Signature: tutelary manifestation, vows made visible, and practice pressed into the world.
yidam.purviewInnateSummary: Your meditation opens vistas beyond the self: you gain Enhancement when discerning illusions or soul-tests tied to practiced devotion, and you may briefly manifest an advisor-aspect of your yidam for counsel. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Yidam.

behique.name: Behique
behique.description: The Zem Signature: spirit-shapes, idols that answer, and medicine that follows form, not argument.
behique.purviewInnateSummary: Healing and oath-smoke mark your steps: you sense lingering curses or unfulfilled healing oaths nearby, and you may sanctify small spaces for restful recovery. — Pandora’s Box (Revised), Behique.
